title: MicronutrientCalculatorConfig
description: Schema for Micronutrient Calculator node configuration and Planning Graph metadata.

$schema.description: Optional local schema reference for editor tooling.

nodeId.description: Planning Graph node id for this calculator (e.g., 'pg.health.micronutrientCalculator').

category.description: Sub-category or grouping within the domain (e.g., 'nutrition').

shortLabel.description: Optional abbreviated label for compact UIs.

description.description: Long-form description of what this calculator does and where it fits.

tags.description: Tag list for search and grouping in the Planning Graph explorer.

paths.description: Relative file paths for this calculator's main artifacts.

schema.description: Path to the calculator input/output JSON schema.

shim.description: Path to the pure calculation shim module.

view.description: Path to the React view component.

hooks.description: Path to the React hooks module.

mappings.description: Path to Planning Graph mappings for this calculator.

readme.description: Path to local documentation for this calculator.

planningGraph.description: Metadata describing how this calculator participates in the Planning Graph.

graphLabel.description: Label displayed in Planning Graph visualizations.

graphDescription.description: Description of this node's role in the graph.

priority.description: Priority / ordering hint for Planning Graph UIs.

inputsFrom.description: List of node ids that provide inputs to this calculator.

feedsInto.description: List of node ids that consume this calculator's outputs.

edgeHints.description: Optional descriptive hints for graph edges.

from.description: Hints for incoming edges: key = nodeId, value = description string.

to.description: Hints for outgoing edges: key = nodeId, value = description string.

defaults.description: Default configuration values for the calculator.

profile.description: Default profile assumptions (age, sex, weight, pregnancy/lactation).

healthFocus.description: Which health focus flags are enabled by default.

ssaIntegration.description: Integration defaults for how this calculator participates in SSA flows.

allowLinkToMealPlanner.description: Whether Planning Graph can offer a direct link to meal planner.

allowLinkToInventoryGaps.description: Whether Planning Graph can link to inventory/storehouse 'nutrition gaps' view.

ui.description: UI-specific hints for theming and access.

icon.description: Icon name or token for this calculator.

showNowButton.description: Whether to show a primary 'Now' CTA.

sectionSubtitle.description: Subtitle / helper text for the section.

showInHealthDashboard.description: Whether to surface this calculator on the main health dashboard.

showInPlanningGraphExplorer.description: Whether to show this node in the Planning Graph explorer UI.

quickAccessHotkey.description: Optional hotkey hint for focusing/launching this calculator.

integration.description: Feature flags for how this calculator integrates with SSA subsystems.

supportsPlanningGraph.description: Whether this calculator participates in Planning Graph flows.

supportsSessions.description: Whether this calculator can spawn or influence sessions.

supportsHouseholdProfiles.description: Whether this calculator uses or updates household profile data.

supportsHouseholdMembers.description: Whether this calculator can be run per household member.

sessionDomain.description: If supportsSessions is true, the domain of sessions this calculator can influence (e.g. 'meals', 'health').

emitEvents.description: Mapping of logical event types to eventBus type strings.

calculated.description: Event type emitted when micronutrients are calculated.

appliedNow.description: Event type emitted when the 'Now' flow is triggered.
